subject: Social Sciences
title: Liberation Heroes
tagline: Meet the heroes who fought for freedom in South Africa!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: Who was South Africa's first democratically elected president?
options: Youth Day, honouring the 1976 Soweto uprising
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Nelson Mandela is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Nelson Mandela.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.question: On which island was Nelson Mandela imprisoned?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Robben Island is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Robben Island.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.question: Who was a key anti-apartheid leader and Mandela's close ally?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Oliver Tambo is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Oliver Tambo.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.question: Which women's leader organised the 1956 anti-pass march?
options: Youth Day, honouring the 1976 Soweto uprising
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Lilian Ngoyi is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Lilian Ngoyi.

stages.name: Stage 5
stages.question: What organisation did many liberation heroes belong to?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! The African National Congress is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is The African National Congress.

stages.name: Stage 6
stages.question: Who was Steve Biko?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! A Black Consciousness Movement leader is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A Black Consciousness Movement leader.

stages.name: Stage 7
stages.question: What year did Nelson Mandela become president?

stages.name: Stage 8
stages.question: What was Albertina Sisulu known for?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Anti-apartheid activism and leadership is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Anti-apartheid activism and leadership.

stages.name: Stage 9
stages.question: What is 16 June known as in South Africa?
options: Youth Day, honouring the 1976 Soweto uprising
stages.correctOption: Youth Day, honouring the 1976 Soweto uprising
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Youth Day, honouring the 1976 Soweto uprising is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Youth Day, honouring the 1976 Soweto uprising.

stages.name: Stage 10
stages.question: Who received the Nobel Peace Prize with Mandela in 1993?
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! F.W. de Klerk is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is F.W. de Klerk.
